name: Unique Veterinary Prescription Diet Adult Cat Struvite Chicken 5kg
description: How it works: Dissolution of struvite stones with optimal urine PH (6.2-6.4), Urine acidifying properties and low magnesium level (0.04%), Content rich in probiotics and prebiotics, Composition containing organic trace elements, Content of cranberry ( urinary tract health and antioxidant), Wild sea buckthorn content (Omega-7 source and anti-inflammatory) Ingredients Chicken Protein, Brown Rice, Pea Protein, Corn Gluten Meal, Chicken Oil, Hydrolyzed Chicken Protein, Sodium Chloride, Sugar Beet Pulp, Fish Oil, Hydrolyzed Chicken Liver, Vitamin and Mineral Premix, Natural Flavors, Brewer's Yeast, Calcium Sulphate, Probiotic, Dried Algae, MOS, ?-Glucan, Tocopherol, Marigold Extract, Yucca, Cranberry, Glycosaminoglycan, Chondrotin Sulfate, Wild Seaweed. Raw Material Components Raw Protein 32.54% Raw oil 14.10% Raw Cellulose (Fiber) 2.60% Ash 7.20% Moisture 4.20% Omega-3 1.05% Omega 6 3.75% Calcium 0.80% Phosphorus 0.60% Sodium 0.41% Magnesium 0.042% Potassium 0.45% chloride 0.46% Urine Acidifying Substances Sodium Chlorite 1.50% Calcium Sulphate 0.80% methionine 7000 mg/kg It does not contain sulfur dioxide.
